summary: Viral Story Engine (Phase 4) Testing Complete - All 23 backend API tests passed. Frontend share page, landing page with A/B hero variants, alive signals, featured story, and StoryVideoStudio fork_data loading all verified. Fixed SharePage to store remix_data in correct format for StoryVideoPipeline.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed SharePage.jsx to store remix_data in correct format for StoryVideoPipeline.js (was storing fork_data which StoryVideoPipeline doesn't read)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test share ID 'b9658c73-be1' with title 'The Last Echo'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Viral Story Engine fully tested. Test share ID 'b9658c73-be1' has 6+ forks and characters ['Lyra','The Stone Speaker','Commander Ash']. Fork endpoint increments fork count. Share page stores remix_data for StoryVideoPipeline prefill. A/B hero variants A/B/C all work. Alive signals show real-time data. Featured story shows 'The Last Echo'.

tests: Returns fork data with parentShareId, storyContext, characters, tone, conflict, type
Increments fork count on parent share
Returns chain array with id, title, createdAt
Accepts viral fields: storyContext, characters, tone, conflict, hookText, shareCaption
Returns featured story with title, preview, forks, views

elements: Social proof bar (fork count, recent activity, views)
A/B tested hero with variant badge (tested variant C)
Alive signals (continuations today, active creators, latest fork)
Featured story card with Continue button

tests: Clicking Continue on share page stores remix_data in localStorage
StoryVideoPipeline loads remix_data and prefills prompt

bug_fixed.issue: SharePage.jsx stored fork_data but StoryVideoPipeline.js reads remix_data
bug_fixed.fix: Updated SharePage.jsx to store both remix_data (for StoryVideoPipeline) and fork_data (for backward compatibility with StoryVideoStudio.js)
